title: SEN Parent Meet Up
sub: How to help your child with spellings
description: A short input on various educational or SEN topics and then plenty of time to network with the other mums, sharing advice and empathy over coffee and cake!

title: Dyslexia
sub: How to help your child with spellings
description: This session aims to help you understand Dyslexia, or issues your child may have with reading, spelling or writing, and give you lots of ideas and strategies to support them. There will be lots of resources to review, practical tips and time for questions too.

title: ADHD
sub: How to help your child with spellings
description: Understanding the issues that your child may have with aspects of their school life, due to ADHD (either diagnosed or suspected). There will be resources, books and lots of strategies shared.
